response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level polyglot engineer with proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems and recent, highly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. While he lacks the explicitly required strong Python background, his extensive polyglot experience, strong TypeScript skills, and direct alignment with the AI-native, agentic workflow mindset make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Proven ability to design high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong software craftsmanship mindset with deep experience in TDD, CI/CD, and operational ownership.
concerns: Does not possess the 'must-have' strong Python expertise listed in the job description.
Resume timeline shows an unusually recent or future start date (April 2025) for his current AI-relevant role.
Heavy reliance on niche languages like DLang in past high-throughput roles may require an adjustment period to a new stack.
